mnemonics: RCR: Read, Clean, Report. The three core stages of an R analytics workflow.
keyPoints: Utilize official R documentation (e.g., 'An Introduction to R') for foundational knowledge.
Leverage R-bloggers and community forums (like Stack Overflow) for practical problem-solving and current trends.
Practice with datasets from TidyTuesday or other open-data initiatives to apply concepts.
commonMistakes: Over-reliance on one resource type; balance official documentation, community help, and hands-on practice.
Jumping into complex packages like ggplot2 or dplyr without first mastering base R syntax and data structures.
Passively reading code instead of actively reproducing examples and working through exercises.
